c24289.st: Simon Peter, a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ,

c24290.st: To those who ... have received a faith as precious as ours:

c24291.st: through [the] righteousness of our God and Savior Jesus Christ

c24292.st: Grace and peace be multiplied to you

c24293.st: through [the] knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord.

c24295.st: has given ... [we need] for life and godliness

c24296.st: through the knowledge of Him who called us [by His] own glory and excellence.

c24297.st: Through [these] He has given us [His] precious and magnificent promises,

c24298.st: so that through [them] you may become partakers of [the] divine nature,

c24299.st: now that you have escaped the corruption in the world caused by evil desires.

c24300.st: For this very [reason], make every effort

c24301.st: to add to your faith virtue;

c24308.st: For [if] you possess these [qualities] and continue to grow [in them],

c24309.st: they will keep you from being ineffective and unproductive in [your] knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.

c24311.st: is ... to the point of blindness,

c24313.st: having forgotten that he has been cleansed from his past sins.

c24314.st: Therefore, brothers, be all the more eager

c24315.st: to make your calling and election sure.

c24316.st: For if you practice these things

c24318.st: and you will receive a lavish reception into the eternal kingdom

c24319.st: of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ.

c24320.st: Therefore, I will always remind you of these things,

c24322.st: and are established in the truth you now have.

c24324.st: as long as I [live] in the tent [of my body],

c24327.st: that [it] will soon be laid aside,

c24328.st: as our Lord Jesus Christ has made clear to me.

c24329.st: And I will make every effort to ensure

c24330.st: [that] after my departure, you will be able to recall these things at all times.

c24332.st: For we did not follow cleverly devised fables

c24333.st: when we made known to you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ,

c24334.st: but we were eyewitnesses of His majesty.

c24335.st: For He received honor and glory from God [the] Father

c24336.st: [when] the voice from the Majestic Glory said to Him,

c24338.st: in whom I am well pleased.”

c24339.st: And we ourselves heard this voice from heaven

c24340.st: [when] we were with Him on the holy mountain.

c24341.st: We also have the message of the prophets, [which] has been confirmed beyond doubt.

c24342.st: [And] you will do well ... to [this message],

c24343.st: to pay attention ... as to a lamp shining in [a] dark place,

c24345.st: and [the] morning star rises in your hearts.

c24347.st: that no prophecy of Scripture comes from [the prophet᾽s] own interpretation.

c24348.st: For no prophecy {was} ever brought about through human initiative,

c24349.st: but men spoke from God as they were carried along by [the] Holy Spirit.

c24350.st: Now there were also false prophets among the people,

c24351.st: just as there will be false teachers among you.

c24353.st: [that] even deny the Master who bought them,

c24355.st: Many will follow in their depravity,

c24356.st: [and] because of [them] the way of truth will be defamed.

c24357.st: In their greed, [these false teachers] will exploit you with tales they have concocted.

c24358.st: The longstanding verdict against them remains in force,

c24360.st: For if God {did} not spare [the] angels when they sinned,

c24361.st: but cast [them] into hell, ... in chains ... in gloomy darkness

c24364.st: [if] He did not spare [the] ancient world

c24365.st: but preserved Noah, a preacher of righteousness, among the eight;

c24366.st: when He brought [the] flood [on its] ungodly [people],

c24367.st: [if] ... [the] cities of Sodom and Gomorrah ... reducing [them] to ashes

c24369.st: [as] an example of what is coming on the ungodly;

c24371.st: distressed by the depraved conduct of the lawless

c24373.st: (for that righteous [man], living among them day after day, ... he saw and heard)—

c24374.st: was tormented [in his] righteous soul [by the] lawless deeds

c24375.st: [if all this is so, then the] Lord knows how

c24377.st: and to hold [the] unrighteous for punishment on [the] day of judgment.

c24378.st: [Such punishment is] specially [reserved] for those who ... of [the] flesh

c24384.st: Yet not even angels, [though] greater in strength and power,

c24385.st: dare to bring such slanderous charges against them before [the] Lord.

c24386.st: These [men] [are] like irrational animals, creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed.

c24387.st: They blaspheme in [matters] they do not understand,

c24388.st: [and like] [such creatures], they too will be destroyed.

c24389.st: The harm they will suffer [is the] wages of [their] wickedness.

c24390.st: They consider it a pleasure to carouse in broad daylight.

c24395.st: their desire for sin is never satisfied;

c24401.st: to follow the way of Balaam [son] of Beor,

c24403.st: But he was rebuked for his transgression

c24404.st: by a donkey, [otherwise] without speech, that spoke with a man᾽s voice

c24406.st: These [men] are springs without water and mists driven by a storm.

c24407.st: Blackest darkness is reserved for them.

c24408.st: With lofty [but] empty words, they appeal

c24409.st: [to the] sensual passions of [the] flesh [and] entice

c24410.st: those [who are] just escaping from [others] who live in error.

c24412.st: while they themselves are slaves to corruption.

c24413.st: For a man is a slave to whatever has overcome him.

c24414.st: If indeed they have escaped the corruption of the world

c24415.st: through [their] knowledge of the Lord and Savior Jesus Christ,

c24416.st: only to be entangled [and] overcome by it again,

c24417.st: their final [condition] is worse than [it was] at first.

c24418.st: It would have been better for them

c24419.st: not to have known the way of righteousness

c24421.st: and turned away from the holy commandment passed on to them.

c24422.st: Of them the proverbs are true:

c24424.st: and, “A sow that is washed [goes back] to [her] wallowing in [the] mud.”

c24425.st: Beloved, this [is] now [my] second letter to you.

c24426.st: [Both] of [them] [are] reminders to stir you to wholesome thinking

c24427.st: by recalling what was foretold by the holy prophets and commanded by [our] Lord and Savior through your apostles.

c24428.st: First of all, you must understand

c24429.st: that in the last days scoffers will come, scoffing

c24432.st: “Where is the promise of His coming?”

c24434.st: everything continues as it has from [the] beginning of creation.”

c24437.st: long ago ... [the] heavens existed and [the] earth

c24438.st: by God᾽s word ... was formed out of water and by water,

c24439.st: through which the world of that time ... in the flood.

c24441.st: And by that same word, the present heavens and earth are reserved

c24442.st: for fire, kept for [the] day of judgment and destruction of ungodly men.

c24443.st: Beloved ... {do} not {let} [this] one thing escape your notice:

c24444.st: , ... With [the] Lord a day [is] like a thousand years,

c24445.st: and a thousand years [are] like a day.

c24446.st: The Lord is not slow [to fulfill] [His] promise

c24451.st: but everyone to come to repentance.

c24452.st: But [the] day of [the] Lord will come like a thief.

c24453.st: The heavens will disappear with a roar,

c24454.st: [the] elements will be dissolved in the fire,

c24455.st: and [the] earth and [its] works will not be found.

c24456.st: [Since] everything will be dissolved in this way,

c24457.st: what kind of [people] ought you to be? You ought to conduct yourselves in holiness and godliness

c24458.st: as you anticipate and hasten the coming of the day of God,

c24459.st: when [the] heavens will be dissolved by fire

c24460.st: and [the] elements will melt in the heat.

c24461.st: But in keeping with [God᾽s] promise, we are looking forward to a new heaven and a new earth,

c24463.st: Therefore, beloved, as you anticipate these things,

c24465.st: to be found at peace with Him, without spot [or] blemish.

c24466.st: Consider also that our Lord᾽s patience [brings] salvation,

c24467.st: just as our beloved brother Paul also ... with the wisdom [God] gave him.

c24469.st: [He writes] this way in all [his] letters,

c24471.st: Some [parts] of [his letters] are hard to understand,

c24473.st: as [they do] the rest of [the] Scriptures,

c24475.st: Therefore, beloved, [since] you already know [these things],

c24477.st: so that you will not be carried away by the error of the lawless

c24479.st: But grow in [the] grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ.

c24480.st: To Him [be] the glory both now and to [the] day of eternity.
